title: I Know a Spot
description:
Customize your car, set up beautiful campsites, explore cozy locations, and enjoy time with your dog. Build the perfect spot to simply breathe and relax.

I Know a Spot is a cozy building game focused on atmosphere, creative freedom, vehicle customization, and peaceful exploration. You travel through forests, lakes, mountains, and seasonal environments, each with a calm mood, soft lighting, and detailed nature.

Customize your car
You can personalize multiple cars with different models, colors, wheels, accessories, and small visual upgrades. Every car can feel unique. After arriving at a location, you unpack your gear and place objects freely around the campsite. Tents, lanterns, chairs, stoves, tables, decor items, and small props help you create warm and inviting scenes. 

Add dog to your campsite

A loyal dog companion walks around the camp, reacts to the environment, sits nearby, and brings life to every setup. Your dog makes each spot feel personal and cozy. 
 

There are no timers, no pressure, and no objectives. I Know a Spot is a relaxing sandbox focused on creative building and peaceful moments in nature. You can arrange campsites, customize vehicles, explore new locations, and return to your favorite spots whenever you want.

If you enjoy cozy building games, calm exploration, nature scenery, and simple creative play, this game is for you.
description_short: Customize your car, set up beautiful campsites, explore cozy locations, and enjoy time with your dog. Build the perfect spot to simply breathe and relax.
